sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ الشَّاعِرُ الْغَرِيبُ قَصِيدَةً عَنْ وَطَنِهِ الْبَعِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnik u tuđini napisao je pjesmu o svom dalekom domu.
sentences.translationEn: The exiled poet wrote a poem about his distant homeland.

sentences.arabic: تَذَكَّرَ شَوَارِعَ مَدِينَتِهِ وَرَائِحَةَ الْمَطَرِ عَلَى التُّرَابِ.
sentences.translation: Sjećao se ulica svog grada i mirisa kiše na zemlji.
sentences.translationEn: He remembered the streets of his city and the smell of rain on the earth.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَاقَ إِلَى صَوْتِ أُمِّهِ وَإِلَى جِيرَانِهِ الطَّيِّبِينَ.
sentences.translation: Čeznuo je za glasom majke i za dobrim komšijama.
sentences.translationEn: He longed for his mother's voice and for his kind neighbours.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْغُرْبَةِ، يُصْبِحُ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ صَغِيرٍ فِي الْوَطَنِ ذَكْرَى غَالِيَةً.
sentences.translation: U tuđini svaka sitnica iz domovine postaje dragocjena uspomena.
sentences.translationEn: In exile, every small thing from home becomes a precious memory.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ فِي قَصِيدَتِهِ: «الْوَطَنُ لَيْسَ أَرْضًا فَقَطْ، بَلْ هُوَ رَائِحَةٌ وَصَوْتٌ وَحُلُمٌ.»
sentences.translation: U svojoj pjesmi je rekao: 'Domovina nije samo zemlja, ona je miris, glas i san.'
sentences.translationEn: He wrote in his poem: 'The homeland is not just land — it is a scent, a voice, and a dream.'
